qa_pairs.question: What modules should be loaded to run GROMACS-PLUMED version 2021.2 on CPUs within the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To run GROMACS-PLUMED version 2021.2 on CPUs within the StdEnv/2020 environment, you should load the following modules: `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 openmpi/4.0.3 gromacs-plumed/2021.2`.

qa_pairs.question: What modules are required to enable GPU (CUDA) support for GROMACS-PLUMED version 2021.2 when using the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: For GPU (CUDA) support with GROMACS-PLUMED version 2021.2 in StdEnv/2020, you need to load these modules: `StdEnv/2020 gcc/9.3.0 cuda/11.0 openmpi/4.0.3 gromacs-plumed/2021.2`.

qa_pairs.question: Which compiler and mathematical library are used for the GROMACS-PLUMED version 2021.2 module under the StdEnv/2020 environment?
qa_pairs.answer: The GROMACS-PLUMED version 2021.2 module under StdEnv/2020 is compiled with GCC and uses the MKL mathematical library.
